name: transact
title: Convex Transaction (Quick)
description:
Execute a Convex transaction in one step. Convenient but sends seed over network.

⚠️ SECURITY WARNING: This tool sends your Ed25519 seed to the peer for signing. Only use this:
- Over HTTPS connections
- With peers you fully trust
- For testing/development

For production or sensitive operations, use the safer two-step flow: prepare -> signAndSubmit (seed stays local until submit).

Transactions are atomic operations on the CVM that update global state and can interact with digital assets and smart contracts.

source.description: Convex Lisp source code to execute, e.g. '(transfer #13 1000000000)'

seed.description: Ed25519 seed (64 hex chars). ⚠️ SECURITY: Sent over network to peer for signing. Use HTTPS and trusted peers only!

address.description: Origin account address (e.g. '#13'). Transaction executes from this account.

errorCode.description: CVM error code if the transaction failed

info.description: Execution metadata including juice used, fees, and transaction hash
